title: Gartner to Report Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results on November 3, 2023
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) will report its financial results for third quarter 2023 before the market opens on Friday, November 3, 2023. The press release and earnings supplement, with accompanying financial information, will be posted on the Gartner investor website at https://investor.gartner.com. The Company plans to host a webcast call at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss its financial results for the quarter. Call Access Process Listeners can access the webcast live a.

title: Economic Angst Shakes Up Techs: Chip Stocks Lead the Plunge
text: Only four stocks in the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund NYSEARCA: XLK posted gains on October 13, as the spooky specter of higher interest rates sent tech stocks lower.

title: Gartner: Strong Recurring Business Model With Double Digit Revenue Growth
text: Gartner's Research business shows strong recurring growth, contributing over 80% of total revenue and increasing by 7% during the pandemic. The company's efficient direct sales force covers a broad spectrum of target customers, leveraging comprehensive research reports and tools. Gartner achieved a 10% revenue growth in Q2, with a stable adjusted EPS, low debt leverage, and strong free cash flow conversion. They have a positive outlook for the future.

title: Reasons Why You Should Retain Gartner (IT) in Your Portfolio
text: Gartner's (IT) diverse customer base and industry-leading integrated team reduce risks and provide a competitive edge in a low-barrier market. Foreign currency exchange remains a concern.
